rulings.Case Title: LEONARD D VILLAFLOR et al VS. ALFONSO R ALFONSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Mtn For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions And Order For Sale And Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 25, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF LEONARD VILLAFLOR, JANET VILLAFLOR Motion For Terminating and Monetary Sanctions and Order For Sale and Distribution. Motion for terminating sanction and order for sale and distribution is denied. Motion for monetary sanction is granted. Defendant violated Local Rule 4.3 M by his willful failure to appear at the Early Settlement Conference without just cause. Defendant must pay sanctions to plaintiffs in the amount of $9,290.00 which represents plaintiffs' counsels' reasonable fees and costs spent in preparation for and attendance at the conference, and in bringing this motion. (CCP section 575.2; Lyle declaration.)=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD D VILLAFLOR et al VS. ALFONSO R ALFONSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 25, 2009, line 10, PLAINTIFF LEONARD VILLAFLOR, JANET VILLAFLOR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for Summary Judgment denied. Plaintiffs failed to shift the burden of proof. While the Court believes that defendant's reformation claim is tenuous, the Court cannot grant summary adjudication on the cited claims. The Court's ruling will not completely dispose of the claims. See CCP section 437c(f)(1). Plaintiffs' separate statement does not adequately set forth what amounts are owed and the trial judge will need to make compensatory adjustments regarding the rents, property taxes, and time and effort that defendant has expended in managing the premises. =(302/CWW)
